name: Parpata
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Pitta and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: The best herb for Pitta-dominant fevers and burning sensations.
Effectively treats skin diseases and excessive thirst.
Used as a mild laxative and liver tonic.
plantProfile: Highly valued in Ayurveda for its cooling and blood-purifying properties.
preparationMethods: Decoction of the whole dried plant.
